headline: Baird Maintains Outperform on Tapestry, Raises Price Target to $165
summary: Baird  analyst Mark Altschwager   maintains Tapestry (NYSE:TPR) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $160 to $165.

headline: Spotting Winners: Tapestry (NYSE:TPR) And Consumer Discretionary - Apparel and Accessories Stocks In Q4
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Tapestry (NYSE:TPR) and the best and worst performers in the consumer discretionary - apparel and accessories industry.
